shadowSentences: She walks her dog every evening.
We watched a movie last night.
He reads books on the weekends.
My friends and I play soccer together.
They often visit the local museum.
I love to try new recipes at home.
We regularly go hiking in the mountains.
She is taking a pottery class this semester.
I plan to travel to Japan next summer.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about your eating habits.
questions: Q1: Can you tell me about a typical meal you enjoy?
Q2: What challenges do you face when trying to eat healthily?
Q3: How important do you think it is to have balanced meals?
Q4: What advice would you give someone looking to improve their diet?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel planning.
questions: Q1: What was your last travel experience like?
Q2: What difficulties do you often encounter when organizing a trip?
Q3: In your opinion, what is the best way to plan a vacation?
Q4: What tips would you give to someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about your exercise habits.
questions: Q1: What types of exercise do you enjoy the most?
Q2: What obstacles have you faced in sticking to your workout routine?
Q3: How do you think exercise impacts your overall well-being?
Q4: What advice would you offer someone who wants to start exercising?
